analysis_result: SMO mutation frequency = 0/54 = 0.00% in the WES cohort after filtering for non-synonymous variants with FILTER=PASS. Zero SMO entries found in MOESM5 MAF (checked by Hugo_Symbol='SMO', Entrez_Gene_Id=6608, and chr7 SMO locus coordinates 128,828,713-128,853,380 on GRCh37). Does not match paper-reported 5%.
denominator_used: N = 54 WES samples (all samples with WES='X' in MOESM4 Clinical Data sheet).
assumptions_made: Non-synonymous variant classes defined as {Missense_Mutation, Nonsense_Mutation, Frame_Shift_Del, Frame_Shift_Ins, In_Frame_Del, In_Frame_Ins, Splice_Site, Translation_Start_Site, Nonstop_Mutation} (Silent excluded); FILTER column filtered to PASS (all 7457 MAF rows are PASS anyway); denominator is the full 54-sample WES cohort from MOESM4 regardless of whether the sample appears in the MAF (MOESM5 MAF contains 52 distinct Tumor_Sample_Barcodes, of which 49 match WES-cohort labels via 'Tumor_'+WES label; 5 WES-cohort samples have no MAF rows and 3 MAF barcodes are not in the WES cohort, but SMO was not observed in ANY MAF row regardless); Hugo_Symbol used as primary gene identifier.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
- MOESM4 Clinical Data: 108 rows x 15 columns. Filtered to WES=='X' -> 54 WES samples. WES labels include forms like 'M1014', '1019413', 'RT6712'.
- MOESM5 Supplementary Table 2 (MAF): 7457 rows x 123 columns. Columns of interest: Tumor_Sample_Barcode, Hugo_Symbol, Entrez_Gene_Id, Chromosome, Start_Position, Variant_Classification, FILTER.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
- 54 WES samples from MOESM4 (WES=='X').
- Expected Tumor_Sample_Barcode = 'Tumor_' + WES label -> 54 expected barcodes.
- MAF contains 52 unique Tumor_Sample_Barcodes, 49 of which match expected WES-cohort barcodes.

C. VARIABLE CODING
- Non-synonymous set: {Missense_Mutation, Nonsense_Mutation, Frame_Shift_Del/Ins, In_Frame_Del/Ins, Splice_Site, Translation_Start_Site, Nonstop_Mutation}.
- FILTER=='PASS' (all 7457 rows already PASS in this MAF).

D. COMPUTATION
- Filter step 1: Hugo_Symbol == 'SMO' -> 0 rows. No hits.
- Sanity checks:
  - Searched Hugo_Symbol containing 'SMO' (case-insensitive): only SMOC1 (1 row) and SMOC2 (1 row) found, no SMO.
  - Searched Entrez_Gene_Id == 6608 (SMO): 0 rows.
  - Searched chr7 at SMO GRCh37 locus (128.8-128.9 Mb): only TSPAN33 (1 row) found; no variants within the SMO gene body.
- Therefore: numerator = 0 samples with SMO non-synonymous PASS mutations.
- Denominator = 54.
- Frequency = 0/54 = 0.00%.

E. RESULT
- SMO mutation frequency = 0/54 = 0.00%. Paper reports 5% (approximately 3/54). Discrepant -- zero SMO variants observed in the MOESM5 MAF under any filter.

F. CAVEATS
- The MOESM5 MAF supplied appears to exclude SMO entirely; possibly Fig 2b oncoprint used a different variant source (including non-PASS, germline, or non-coding variants), a separate panel/validation file, or the supplementary MAF was filtered more stringently than what is shown on the oncoprint.
- 5 of 54 WES-cohort samples have no rows in the MAF (may indicate no PASS non-synonymous variants reported for those samples), and 3 MAF barcodes (Tumor_1869, Tumor_M2242, Tumor_RT3379) are not in the WES-cohort list.
- Result remains 0% under every tested interpretation of the filter.
